# Copilot Instructions

<!-- pygeom-agent-instructions:start -->
## PyAnsys Geometry (ansys-geometry-core)

**IMPORTANT:** Before writing any code using `ansys.geometry.core`, you MUST:

1. **Read** the file `.agent/ansys.geometry.core.md` in this workspace
2. **Read linked files** as needed for your task

Regenerate: `python -m ansys.geometry.core agent --env vscode --copy`
<!-- pygeom-agent-instructions:end -->
